Label: /F10/
Issue: Does not specify the supported file formats for PCAP files
Correction: The system shall support PCAP file uploads in .pcap and .pcapng formats only.

Label: /F20/
Issue: Does not specify the default values for the preprocessor configuration
Correction: The system shall provide default values for the preprocessor configuration: Length scaling: 150, Value scaling: Off, Normalization: None, Autoencoder and PCA are selected, Number of hidden layers: 4, Number of nodes in hidden layers: (256, 64, 32, 8), Loss function: MSE, Number of epochs for the training: 100, Optimizer: adam.

Label: /F22/
Issue: Does not specify the expected time for preprocessing to complete
Correction: The system shall complete the preprocessing within 5 minutes for a PCAP file of up to 1GB.

Label: /F30/
Issue: Does not specify the color coding for different protocols
Correction: The system shall use distinct colors for each protocol in the network topology graph: e.g., HTTP - Blue, FTP - Green, TCP - Red.

Label: /F40/
Issue: Does not specify the shapes used for different protocols in the result graph
Correction: The system shall use distinct shapes for each protocol in the result graph: e.g., HTTP - Circle, FTP - Square, TCP - Triangle.

Label: /F50/
Issue: Does not specify the performance metrics for PCA
Correction: The system shall display the performance of PCA using the explained variance ratio for each principal component.

Label: /F60/
Issue: Does not specify the zoom levels for graphs
Correction: The system shall support zoom levels from 10% to 200% for all graphs.

Label: /F70/
Issue: Does not specify the image formats for saving graphs
Correction: The system shall support saving graphs as images in PNG and JPEG formats.

Label: /F80/
Issue: Does not specify the method for selecting runs to compare
Correction: The system shall provide a dropdown menu to select and compare up to three different runs side by side.

Label: /F90/
Issue: Does not specify the responsiveness criteria for asynchronous interaction
Correction: The system shall remain responsive to user input with a maximum delay of 1 second while the preprocessor is running.

Label: /F100/
Issue: Does not specify the types of statistics to be shown
Correction: The system shall display the following statistics for the PCAP file: Count of devices, Count of used protocols, Count of packets, Device that sent the most packets.

Label: /F200/
Issue: Does not specify the window size for graphs
Correction: The system shall open graphs in a new window with a default size of 800x600 pixels.

Label: /F210/
Issue: Does not specify the default key bindings
Correction: The system shall provide the following default key bindings: Open session - Ctrl + O, Save session - Ctrl + S, Save session as - Ctrl + Alt + S, Run preprocessor - Ctrl + R.

Label: /F220/
Issue: Does not specify the format for identifiers in saved sessions
Correction: The system shall include identifiers in the saved session file in the format: Program version hash, PCAP file hash.

Label: /F230/
Issue: Does not specify the threshold for large data warnings
Correction: The system shall display a warning if the selected PCAP file contains more than 2 million packets.

Label: /F240/
Issue: Does not specify the contents of the PDF report
Correction: The system shall include the following in the PDF report: Configurations of preprocessing runs, Results of those configurations, Performance graphs of those configurations.
